description: Vending machine location master. The engine reads from this file only. Removed sites stay listed (under 'do not confuse with active').

locations.name: Sample Location C — Osaka (Abeno)
locations.notes: Often confused with Shibuya location. Brief mechanical pause earlier → resumed.

locations.name: Sample Location X — Tokyo (Shibuya)
locations.notes: If a customer says only 'Shibuya', mention both Shibuya (removed) and Abeno (operator instruction).

rules: When a customer asks about a removed location, always recommend an active location + the EC store.
Ambiguous place names (e.g. 'I saw it in Shibuya') should disambiguate across candidates.
Installation requests are acknowledged only (operator decides) — escalate.
